posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!
There are already some really good feature requests in the community when it comes to the My week section.

What is missing is the ability to add new items via the My week view. Not on mobile, not on dekstop.
For this reason I find myself going back to my personal board ‘tasks & todo’s’ which is a board that should be absolete since the My week view exists.

My request would be to connect a board (in the bakground) to the My week view were items will end up which are added via the My week.
Ths personal to-do board has an automation; when item is created assign myself, and add a dat two day after creation date so these items always shows up in the My week.

Being able to add items from the My week view will give the My week a bit more of a workview instead of only read mode view.
